import { identity } from './identity'; export function pipe(...fns) { return pipeFromArray(fns); } export function pipeFromArray(fns) { if (fns.length === 0) { return identity; } if (fns.length === 1) { return fns[0]; } return function piped(input) { return fns.reduce((prev, fn) => fn(prev), input); }; } //# sourceMappingURL=pipe.js.map
